parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wallet_transactions (
  transaction_type,
  amount,
  booked_member_id,
  wallet_id,
  resource_type,
  resource_id,
  remarks,
  earned_at,
  point_type,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  'credit',
  {{ $json.reward_amount }},
  {{ $json.user_id }},
  (SELECT id FROM wallets WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }} LIMIT 1),
  'TaskManagement',
  {{ $json.task_id }},
  '{{ $json.reason }}',
  UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
  'task_reward',
  UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
  UTC_TIMESTAMP()
);

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
UPDATE wallets
SET
  credited_amount = credited_amount + {{ $json.reward_amount }},
  available_amount = available_amount + {{ $json.reward_amount }},
  updated_at = UTC_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }};

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id AS task_id,
  t.responsible_person_id AS user_id,
  t.target_date,
  t.completed_at,

  TIMESTAMPDIFF(
    HOUR,
    t.completed_at,
    t.target_date
  ) AS hours_difference

FROM task_managements t

WHERE
  t.status = 'completed'

  -- only recent completions
  AND t.completed_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

  -- block already rewarded tasks
  AND t.id NOT IN (
    SELECT resource_id
    FROM wallet_transactions
    WHERE resource_type = 'TaskManagement'
      AND point_type = 'task_reward'
  );

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database
